div.p: Recommendation: Current configuration (150 vnodes) provides excellent distribution. No tuning required.
σ = 239 keys (0.24% variance) ✅ Within acceptable range (< 5%)
Chi-Square Test: χ² = Σ(Observed - Expected)² / Expected χ² ≈ 0.038 (p > 0.99) Distribution is statistically uniform
With 150 virtual nodes per physical node:

ul.li: Each vnode covers ~1/150 of the ring
